description: Style Note Coloured trousers are quite the rage this season and femella gives you the finest. You can pair them with basic tank tops and flip flops. Accessorise with chunky jewellery for a bohemian look. Product Details Bright yellow trousers, has a zippered and buttoned closure, two pockets on the sides in front, belt loops at the waist and stitched details and pleats below the waistband in the front. Our stylist has paired these trousers with a slim brown leather belt Material and Care Blended fabric Cold wash with like colours Do not bleach or wring Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
